prompt: Create a hyper-detailed kawaii otaku room photo scene of a takoyaki party with three young women in matching black-and-pink maid café outfits sitting behind a pink gingham table. The faces should be deliberately obscured with plain brown rectangular blur blocks for privacy. Center the composition on a red electric takoyaki maker with a black round-hole cooking plate, filled with exactly 22 visible takoyaki balls in progress; the middle woman is holding a thin metal pick and turning one ball. On the table include exactly 6 main food/tableware items: 1 pink heart-shaped sign on the left with Japanese text 「たこ焼き パーティー♡」, 2 anime character mugs, 1 bowl of chopped green onions, 1 bowl of diced octopus, 1 bowl of crispy tempura bits, and 1 metal mixing bowl of pale batter with a ladle. Add a small pink anime plush doll on the right. The three women should each wear frilly white maid headbands, black short-sleeve dresses with white ruffles, pink bows, and cute hair accessories; make them pose cheerfully around the takoyaki grill. The background is a very pink anime fan bedroom filled with posters, shelves of plush toys and figurines, fairy lights, a canopy bed with pink curtains, and a glowing neon heart sign reading 「萌え 萌え♡」 with small angel wings. Use warm soft indoor lighting, pastel pink color grading, glossy realistic photography, shallow depth of field, wide-angle lens, high detail, cozy cluttered composition, Japanese idol/maid café aesthetic. Avoid extra people, avoid changing the takoyaki grill into another appliance, keep all Japanese text legible, and maintain the privacy face blur blocks.
